name: dicetown
description: A personal web version of Machi Koro for friends.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
